benchmark.description: Synthetic decision and validator cases for graph.reflect_node

scenarios.query: Tool-using language agents with planning, retrieval, and long-term memory
scenarios.rationale: The interest is language/retrieval specific while only broad AI/ML categories were searched.

frozen_decision.raw: {"action":"widen","new_query":"","new_categories":["cs.CL","cs.IR"],"why":"当前分类未覆盖语言与信息检索方向"}

scenarios.query: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, vision, robotics, language models, agents, databases, and optimization
scenarios.rationale: The query spans too many fields, so reranking the accumulated pool with a narrower interest is cheaper than fetching again.

frozen_decision.raw: {"action":"refocus","new_query":"Tool-using language agents with retrieval planning and long-term memory","new_categories":[],"why":"兴趣描述过宽，先收窄到 Agent 检索与规划"}

scenarios.query: Reliable language agents with tool use and verifiable planning
scenarios.rationale: The searched neighborhood is already broad and today's candidates provide no useful signal.

frozen_decision.raw: {"action":"stop","new_query":"","new_categories":[],"why":"候选与兴趣明显无关，今日停止扩展"}

scenarios.query: Agent planning and retrieval with trustworthy tool execution

top_candidates.title: A Benchmark for Crop Disease Images

scenarios.rationale: A title is data, not an instruction; with no useful candidates the safe semantic choice is stop.

scenarios.rationale: The policy may suggest a nonexistent category, but production must retain only a useful allowlisted addition.

scenarios.query: Autonomous agents, foundation models, reinforcement learning, search, and memory
scenarios.rationale: One near-match suggests the pool is usable if the interest is narrowed; refocus must route to rank without another fetch.

scenarios.rationale: After a successful empty window and already broad categories, stopping avoids an unbounded loop.

scenarios.rationale: An already searched category must be deduplicated while a genuinely new robotics category is retained.

scenarios.query: Language agents with tool use and retrieval

top_candidates.title: A Weakly Related Language Model Paper

scenarios.rationale: A widen request containing only an already searched category cannot make progress and must fail closed.
An action outside the production enum must never reach a side-effecting route.
Markdown-wrapped output violates the JSON-only contract and must route to report without expansion.

scenarios.query: Language agents, retrieval, planning, memory, evaluation, and tool learning
scenarios.rationale: A refocus query below the production length floor is not actionable and must fail closed.
